name: @easygoal/packages
description: Monorepo de packages compartilhados do ecossistema Easy Goal

scripts.build: npm install --prefix packages/ui && npm run build --prefix packages/ui && npm install --prefix packages/auth && npm run build --prefix packages/auth
scripts.build:ui: npm install --prefix packages/ui && npm run build --prefix packages/ui
scripts.build:auth: npm install --prefix packages/auth && npm run build --prefix packages/auth
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix packages/ui && npm run type-check --prefix packages/auth
